003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.rest.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.*;
021
022/**
023 * Static literals for {@code juneau-rest-server}: annotation attribute name constants used for
024 * allowlist inheritance checks and other module-internal logic.
025 *
026 * <p>
027 * HTTP wire names shared with clients belong on {@link RestSharedConstants} instead.
028 *
029 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
030 *    <li class='jc'>{@link RestSharedConstants}
031 * </ul>
032 */
033@SuppressWarnings({
034   "java:S115", // PROPERTY_ + camelCase property name mirrors annotation attribute name; not strict UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
035})
036public final class RestServerConstants {
037
038   private RestServerConstants() {}
039
040   /**
041    * The {@code "allowedParserOptions"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching.
042    *
043    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#allowedParserOptions()
044    */
045   public static final String PROPERTY_allowedParserOptions = "allowedParserOptions";
046
047   /**
048    * The {@code "allowedSerializerOptions"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching.
049    *
050    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#allowedSerializerOptions()
051    */
052   public static final String PROPERTY_allowedSerializerOptions = "allowedSerializerOptions";
053
054   /** The {@code "allowedHeaderParams"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
055   public static final String PROPERTY_allowedHeaderParams = "allowedHeaderParams";
056
057   /** The {@code "allowedMethodHeaders"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
058   public static final String PROPERTY_allowedMethodHeaders = "allowedMethodHeaders";
059
060   /** The {@code "allowedMethodParams"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
061   public static final String PROPERTY_allowedMethodParams = "allowedMethodParams";
062
063   /** The {@code "disableContentParam"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
064   public static final String PROPERTY_disableContentParam = "disableContentParam";
065
066   /** The {@code "renderResponseStackTraces"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
067   public static final String PROPERTY_renderResponseStackTraces = "renderResponseStackTraces";
068
069   /** The {@code "problemDetails"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to opt the resource (or one of its router parents) into RFC 7807 {@code application/problem+json} error responses. */
070   public static final String PROPERTY_problemDetails = "problemDetails";
071
072   /** The {@code "eagerInit"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
073   public static final String PROPERTY_eagerInit = "eagerInit";
074
075   /**
076    * The {@code "lazyChildren"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to opt the
077    * parent resource into deferred (first-invocation) construction of its {@code @Rest(children=...)} sub-resources
078    * instead of the default eager construction at startup.
079    *
080    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#lazyChildren()
081    */
082   public static final String PROPERTY_lazyChildren = "lazyChildren";
083
084   /**
085    * The {@code "virtualThreads"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to opt the resource
086    * (or one of its {@code @RestOp}-annotated methods) into per-request virtual-thread dispatch on Java 21+. On
087    * runtimes older than Java 21 the flag is logged once and ignored.
088    */
089   public static final String PROPERTY_virtualThreads = "virtualThreads";
090
091   /**
092    * The {@code "asyncTimeoutMillis"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to override the
093    * default 30-second timeout applied by {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.AsyncResponseProcessor} to
094    * {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture}-returning handlers. {@code "0"} disables the timeout entirely.
095    */
096   public static final String PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis = "asyncTimeoutMillis";
097
098   /**
099    * The {@code "asyncCompletionExecutor"} annotation attribute name — names a {@link java.util.concurrent.Executor}
100    * bean (resolved from the resource's {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore}) that routes
101    * {@link java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture} completion callbacks through a dedicated thread pool instead of
102    * the future's natural completion thread. Empty string (default) = no override.
103    */
104   public static final String PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor = "asyncCompletionExecutor";
105
106   /** The {@code "clientVersionHeader"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
107   public static final String PROPERTY_clientVersionHeader = "clientVersionHeader";
108
109   /** The {@code "uriAuthority"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
110   public static final String PROPERTY_uriAuthority = "uriAuthority";
111
112   /** The {@code "uriContext"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
113   public static final String PROPERTY_uriContext = "uriContext";
114
115   /** The {@code "uriRelativity"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
116   public static final String PROPERTY_uriRelativity = "uriRelativity";
117
118   /** The {@code "uriResolution"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
119   public static final String PROPERTY_uriResolution = "uriResolution";
120
121   /** The {@code "noInherit"} annotation attribute name. */
122   public static final String PROPERTY_noInherit = "noInherit";
123
124   /** The {@code "defaultCharset"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on both {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations (op-level {@code noInherit} blocks the {@code @Rest(defaultCharset)} fallback) and {@code @Rest} annotations (class-level {@code noInherit} cuts off the resource-class hierarchy walk). */
125   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultCharset = "defaultCharset";
126
127   /** The {@code "maxInput"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on both {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations (op-level {@code noInherit} blocks the {@code @Rest(maxInput)} fallback) and {@code @Rest} annotations (class-level {@code noInherit} cuts off the resource-class hierarchy walk). */
128   public static final String PROPERTY_maxInput = "maxInput";
129
130   /** The {@code "messages"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving message bundle locations. */
131   public static final String PROPERTY_messages = "messages";
132
133   /** The {@code "callLogger"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the call logger. */
134   public static final String PROPERTY_callLogger = "callLogger";
135
136   /** The {@code "authenticator"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the child-resource inheritance walk when resolving the {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.RestAuthenticator}. */
137   public static final String PROPERTY_authenticator = "authenticator";
138
139   /** The {@code "debugEnablement"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the debug enablement bean. */
140   public static final String PROPERTY_debugEnablement = "debugEnablement";
141
142   /** Property name for the {@code debugDefault} setting. */
143   public static final String PROPERTY_debugDefault = "debugDefault";
144
145   /** The {@code "staticFiles"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the static files bean. */
146   public static final String PROPERTY_staticFiles = "staticFiles";
147
148   /** The {@code "swaggerProvider"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the swagger provider bean. */
149   public static final String PROPERTY_swaggerProvider = "swaggerProvider";
150
151   /** The {@code "openApiProvider"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the OpenAPI 3.1 provider bean. */
152   public static final String PROPERTY_openApiProvider = "openApiProvider";
153
154   /** The {@code "debug"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
155   public static final String PROPERTY_debug = "debug";
156
157   /** The {@code "consumes"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to block class-level {@code @Rest(consumes)} from contributing to an op, and as the property name for the {@code @Rest(consumes)} chain walk in {@link RestContext#getConsumes()}. */
158   public static final String PROPERTY_consumes = "consumes";
159
160   /** The {@code "produces"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching to block class-level {@code @Rest(produces)} from contributing to an op, and as the property name for the {@code @Rest(produces)} chain walk in {@link RestContext#getProduces()}. */
161   public static final String PROPERTY_produces = "produces";
162
163   /** The {@code "responseProcessors"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the response-processor list. */
164   public static final String PROPERTY_responseProcessors = "responseProcessors";
165
166   /** The {@code "restOpArgs"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the per-operation argument resolver list. */
167   public static final String PROPERTY_restOpArgs = "restOpArgs";
168
169   /** The {@code "httpMethod"} / {@code "method"} surface — reserved for {@code noInherit} matching; op HTTP method has no {@link RestContext} scalar fallback. */
170   public static final String PROPERTY_httpMethod = "httpMethod";
171
172   /** The {@code "converters"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations to block class-level {@code @Rest(converters)} from contributing to an op. */
173   public static final String PROPERTY_converters = "converters";
174
175   /** The {@code "guards"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations to block class-level {@code @Rest(guards)} (and {@code roleGuard} / {@code rolesDeclared}) from contributing to an op. */
176   public static final String PROPERTY_guards = "guards";
177
178   /** The {@code "matchers"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
179   public static final String PROPERTY_matchers = "matchers";
180
181   /** The {@code "clientVersion"} annotation attribute name — folded into {@link #PROPERTY_matchers} for op-level matchers (drives {@code ClientVersionMatcher} injection). */
182   public static final String PROPERTY_clientVersion = "clientVersion";
183
184   /** The {@code "roleGuard"} annotation attribute name — folded into {@link #PROPERTY_guards} for op-level guards. */
185   public static final String PROPERTY_roleGuard = "roleGuard";
186
187   /** The {@code "rolesDeclared"} annotation attribute name — folded into {@link #PROPERTY_guards} for op-level guards (drives {@code RoleBasedRestGuard} role-name set). */
188   public static final String PROPERTY_rolesDeclared = "rolesDeclared";
189
190   /** The {@code "serializers"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
191   public static final String PROPERTY_serializers = "serializers";
192
193   /** The {@code "parsers"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
194   public static final String PROPERTY_parsers = "parsers";
195
196   /** The {@code "encoders"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
197   public static final String PROPERTY_encoders = "encoders";
198
199   /** The {@code "defaultRequestHeaders"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
200   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders = "defaultRequestHeaders";
201
202   /** The {@code "defaultResponseHeaders"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
203   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders = "defaultResponseHeaders";
204
205   /** The {@code "defaultRequestAttributes"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
206   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes = "defaultRequestAttributes";
207
208   /** The {@code "defaultRequestQueryData"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
209   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultRequestQueryData = "defaultRequestQueryData";
210
211   /** The {@code "defaultRequestFormData"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
212   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultRequestFormData = "defaultRequestFormData";
213
214   /** The {@code "defaultAccept"} annotation attribute name — folded into {@link #PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders}. */
215   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultAccept = "defaultAccept";
216
217   /** The {@code "defaultContentType"} annotation attribute name — folded into {@link #PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders}. */
218   public static final String PROPERTY_defaultContentType = "defaultContentType";
219
220   /** The {@code "partSerializer"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
221   public static final String PROPERTY_partSerializer = "partSerializer";
222
223   /** The {@code "partParser"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching. */
224   public static final String PROPERTY_partParser = "partParser";
225
226   /** The {@code "path"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @RestOp} / verb annotations. */
227   public static final String PROPERTY_path = "path";
228
229   /** The {@code "paths"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving top-level multi-mount path specs. */
230   public static final String PROPERTY_paths = "paths";
231
232   /** The {@code "mixins"} annotation attribute name — used in {@code noInherit} matching on {@code @Rest} annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving operation mixins. */
233   public static final String PROPERTY_mixins = "mixins";
234
235   /** The {@code "value"} annotation attribute name — used by {@code @RestOp}/verb annotations to hold the (optional method-prefixed) path; folded into {@link #PROPERTY_path}. */
236   public static final String PROPERTY_value = "value";
237
238   /**
239    * The {@code "observability"} annotation attribute name — tri-state per-resource / per-op observability control.
240    * {@code "true"} opts the resource in and requires a wired backend (startup-fail if missing); {@code "false"} short-circuits
241    * the observability block entirely; {@code ""} (default) inherits / uses the existing silent-no-op behavior.
242    *
243    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#observability()
244    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp#observability()
245    */
246   public static final String PROPERTY_observability = "observability";
247
248   /**
249    * The {@code "metricName"} annotation attribute name — per-op override for the metric name passed to
250    * {@link MetricsRecorder#record(String,String,String,int,java.time.Duration,Throwable,String,String) record()}. Empty string (default) uses
251    * the recorder's own default name derivation.
252    *
253    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp#metricName()
254    */
255   public static final String PROPERTY_metricName = "metricName";
256
257   /**
258    * The {@code "metricTags"} annotation attribute name — per-op additional metric tags passed to
259    * {@link MetricsRecorder#record(String,String,String,int,java.time.Duration,Throwable,String,String) record()}. Format: comma-separated
260    * {@code key=value} pairs (e.g. {@code "team=payments,region=us-east"}). Empty string (default) means
261    * no additional tags.
262    *
263    * @see org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp#metricTags()
264    */
265   public static final String PROPERTY_metricTags = "metricTags";
266
267   /**
268    * Servlet-request attribute key under which the per-request id minted or honored by
269    * {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.filter.RequestIdFilter} is stashed.
270    *
271    * <p>
272    * Call loggers and observability layers should resolve the id via this key so they all see the same value:
273    * <p class='bjava'>
274    *    String <jv>id</jv> = (String)<jv>req</jv>.getAttribute(RestServerConstants.<jsf>REQUEST_ID</jsf>);
275    * </p>
276    *
277    * @since 10.0.0
278    */
279   public static final String REQUEST_ID = "requestId";
280
281   /**
282    * Servlet-request attribute key under which the authenticated {@link java.security.Principal}
283    * is stashed by {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.BearerTokenGuard} /
284    * {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard} and resolved by
285    * {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthArg} for {@code @Auth Principal} parameters.
286    *
287    * <p>
288    * Op handlers can resolve the principal via the typed argument injector:
289    * <p class='bjava'>
290    *    <ja>@RestGet</ja>(path=<js>"/me"</js>)
291    *    <jk>public</jk> Profile me(<ja>@Auth</ja> Principal <jv>p</jv>) { ... }
292    * </p>
293    *
294    * <p>
295    * Or directly:
296    * <p class='bjava'>
297    *    Principal <jv>p</jv> = (Principal)<jv>req</jv>.getAttribute(RestServerConstants.<jsf>PRINCIPAL_ATTR</jsf>);
298    * </p>
299    *
300    * @since 10.0.0
301    */
302   public static final String PRINCIPAL_ATTR = "juneau.principal";
303
304   /**
305    * Default header name read by {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard} when configured
306    * with the {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard.Source#HEADER HEADER} source and no
307    * custom name is supplied.
308    *
309    * @since 10.0.0
310    */
311   public static final String API_KEY_HEADER = "X-API-Key";
312}
